clusters.justification: This domain captures the physiological generation, subjective experience, and regulation of emotional and arousal states, which consistently co-activate within the salience and limbic networks.

These terms are unified by the computation of subjective utility, incentive-based motivation, and reinforcement learning, mapping strongly onto ventral striatal, dopaminergic, and orbitofrontal circuitry.

This domain encompasses the high-level representation and integration of internal subjective states for both the self (autobiographical, self-referential) and others (empathy, theory of mind), classically anchored by the default mode network.
